benefits.description: Completely changed texture of skin - slippery dolphin in water and baby butt soft when dry. Skin clarity and wrinkling better than most 30 year olds at age 57. Starting to show some laxity.
Skin better than most 30 year olds in terms of clarity and wrinkling at age 57
Injected Laennec into a creaky knee and it was 'fixed' in a week

protocol_notes: 2 months on, 1 month off cycling for GHK-CU and Laennec stack, ongoing for approximately 1 year. Also does microneedling 1.5mm every 6-8 weeks for ~4 years. Uses lidocaine cream for microneedling. Does face, neck, chest, and forearms. Diet is meat-based/carnivore. Added desiccated organs about 3 years ago. Thinking about adding Vesugen or Ventfort. Laennec injected subcutaneously (not mesotherapy). Raised in San Diego, CA, currently 57.
